pickup.name: Magnetic Lodestone
pickup.effect: Attracts metallic objects and disrupts electrical currents

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct causes a wall of pressurized bubbles to reveal the path to the Inner Sanctum

pickup.name: Ancient Resonator Bell
pickup.effect: Emits a sonic pulse that shatters brittle structures

encounters.trigger: Clearing the Eel-Bot triggers an ancient mechanism to unlock the gate to the Abyss Spire

pickup.name: Heart of the Tide
pickup.effect: Infuses gear with freezing hydro-energy

encounters.trigger: The Golem's demise shatters its crystalline core, opening the heavy obsidian doors to the Boss's throne room

boss.name: The Abyssal Warden
boss.victory_condition: Freezing the Warden's mantle to render it brittle enough for a final strike with the staff

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen Heart of the Tide to stabilize the ocean floor
level.reward: Master Geomancer Title and the Eternal Trident

pickup.name: Glowing Kelp
pickup.effect: Provides bioluminescent vision

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab clears the debris blocking the path to the kelp forest

pickup.name: Shell Shield
pickup.effect: Reduces incoming damage by half

encounters.trigger: The eel drops a key scale that opens the gate to the deep cavern

pickup.name: Pearl Amulet
pickup.effect: Boosts animal communication

encounters.trigger: Urchin destruction causes the temple altar to slide back revealing the boss chamber

boss.name: Guardian Leviathan
boss.victory_condition: Calm the creature using the Amulet to end the encounter peacefully

level.objective: Restore balance to the sunken reef by calming the Guardian Leviathan
level.reward: The ability to summon a friendly sea turtle

pickup.name: Vial of Sulfuric Acid
pickup.effect: Corrodes protective barriers

encounters.trigger: Opening the Airlock releases the Sentry and reveals the path to the Filtration Hub

pickup.name: Cursed Pearl of Binding
pickup.effect: Restrains ethereal entities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Eel-Fused Corpse triggers a surge that opens the sealed Vault door

pickup.name: Ancient Leviathan Scale
pickup.effect: Negates void damage

encounters.trigger: Breaking the Revenant's shield triggers the summoning ritual for the final boss

boss.name: Trench Monarch of Souls
boss.victory_condition: Bind the Monarch's soul to the Pearl to stabilize the trench

level.objective: Purge the sunken catacombs of the corrupted aquatic undead
level.reward: The Crown of the Abyssal Necromancer

pickup.name: Thermal Battery
pickup.effect: Increases elemental conductivity

encounters.trigger: Debris falls, forcing the player toward the flooded laboratory

pickup.name: Superconductor Rod
pickup.effect: Amplifies electrical discharge radius

encounters.trigger: A terminal activation unlocks the pressure-sealed vault gate

pickup.name: Conductive Core
pickup.effect: Required to overload the boss's chassis

encounters.trigger: Destroying the construct forces the reactor door open to the boss arena

boss.name: Leviathan Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Conductive Core into the Leviathan to short-circuit its power source

level.objective: Deactivate the trench facility's failing nuclear power core before it implodes

level.setting: Sunken Temple of the Abyssal Serpent

pickup.name: Bio-luminescent Spore
pickup.effect: Temporarily illuminates dark areas

encounters.trigger: Opening the first altar door reveals the Spore.

pickup.name: Tidal Current Regulator
pickup.effect: Allows movement through heavy whirlpools

encounters.trigger: Using the Spore blinds the Lurker, unlocking the path forward.

pickup.name: Abyssal Key
pickup.effect: Opens the inner sanctum vault

encounters.trigger: Draining the water with the Regulator allows entry to the sanctum.

boss.name: Leviathan of the Void
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Abyssal Key into the boss's chest plate to deactivate its shield.

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of the Sea from the Temple depths.
level.reward: The Shadowblade's Mask, providing silent movement.

pickup.name: Oxygen-Saturated Gel
pickup.effect: Increases underwater fire intensity

encounters.trigger: Cracking the hull draws attention to the main laboratory

pickup.name: Ancient Conductive Conduit
pickup.effect: Allows thermal energy to chain across metallic surfaces

encounters.trigger: The death of the eel shorts the circuits, opening the heavy bulkhead to the reactor core

pickup.name: Core Stabilizer Core
pickup.effect: Required to neutralize the boss cooling system

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers the final lockdown release for the Boss

boss.name: Abyssal Leviathan Mech
boss.victory_condition: Disable the coolant vents using the Core Stabilizer Core, then ignite the internal combustion engine

level.objective: Shut down the unstable reactor before the station implodes

level.setting: Sunken industrial facility in the Abyssal trench

pickup.name: High-Pressure Hydraulic Fluid
pickup.effect: Increases melee impact damage

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the sentry reveals the auxiliary pump mechanism required to drain the next room

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Melts heavy steel plating

encounters.trigger: Slaying the eel allows access to the coolant controls which triggers the containment breach sequence

pickup.name: Master Override Keycard
pickup.effect: Opens the Boss containment hatch

encounters.trigger: Securing the keycard opens the bulkhead leading to the main reactor core housing the boss

boss.name: Leviathan Prime
boss.victory_condition: Hack the boss main frame using the Override Keycard while it is stunned

level.objective: Purge the facility and stabilize the reactor core

pickup.name: Glittering Kelp Ribbon
pickup.effect: Increases spell range

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab unseals the gate to the Singing Grotto.

pickup.name: Sunken Music Box
pickup.effect: Stuns enemies with melody

encounters.trigger: Calming the pufferfish activates the lift to the Abyssal Stage.

pickup.name: Chromatic Pearl
pickup.effect: Disrupts illusions

encounters.trigger: Clearing the ink reveals the path to the Boss Chamber.

boss.name: The Illusionist Octopus
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chromatic Pearl to shatter the octopus's clones and reveal its true form.

level.objective: Restore harmony to the Coral Conservatory by defeating the rogue master of illusions.

pickup.name: Fermented Nectar
pickup.effect: Temporarily increases attack speed and agility

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker opens the path to the inner Canopy Walkway.

pickup.name: Ancient Sunstone
pickup.effect: Emits blinding light that stuns nocturnal predators

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the Sunstone triggers the ritual awakening of the Temple Guardian.

pickup.name: Talisman of Dominion
pickup.effect: Allows the user to command the surrounding flora to bind the boss

encounters.trigger: Escaping the Jaguar forces the player into the final Boss arena.

boss.name: Primordial Titan Serpent
boss.victory_condition: Use the Talisman to bind the serpent's coils before dealing the final blow.

level.objective: Traverse the chaotic ruins and neutralize the Titan Serpent to restore order to the jungle.
level.reward: The title of Alpha Guardian and mastery over the jungle ecosystem.

pickup.name: Flare Dust
pickup.effect: Bright chemical powder that blinds light-sensitive creatures.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Vine Stalker causes the fog to lift, revealing the path to the inner courtyard.

encounters.hazard: Pressure plates that shoot poisonous darts

pickup.name: Obsidian Blade
pickup.effect: A ceremonial dagger capable of piercing spirit armor.

encounters.trigger: The death of the Spectral Jaguar drops a key fragment that opens the vault gate.

pickup.name: Sun-Etched Idol
pickup.effect: An artifact that weakens the boss's shadow shielding.

encounters.trigger: Securing the Sun-Etched Idol removes the protective seal on the main boss arena entrance.

boss.name: Shadow Keeper
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sun-Etched Idol to dispel the Shadow Keeper's armor before delivering the final strike.

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of the Jungle from the Inner Sanctum.
level.reward: The Ranger's Cloak of Invisibility and the ancient jungle throne.

pickup.name: Antidote Vial
pickup.effect: Grants temporary immunity to jungle paralysis toxins

encounters.trigger: Triggering the tripwire reveals the location of the scout.

pickup.name: Sun-Flare Amulet
pickup.effect: Emits a blinding light that stuns shadowed entities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the stalker draws the attention of the temple guardian.

pickup.name: Sacred Obsidian Key
pickup.effect: Opens the inner chamber of the boss arena

encounters.trigger: Inserting the key into the altar awakens the boss.

boss.name: Primeval Shadow-Wraith
boss.victory_condition: Expose the Wraith to the light emitted by the Amulet then strike with the Obsidian Dagger

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of the Jungle before the eclipse completes.
level.reward: Ancient Rogue's Mantle and total immunity to environmental hazards.

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Petal
pickup.effect: Restores health and reveals hidden paths

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crawler reveals a glowing trail leading to the ancient ruins

pickup.name: Primal Resin
pickup.effect: Increases blade sharpness

encounters.trigger: Using the petal forces the sentinel to retreat, opening the gate to the inner sanctuary

pickup.name: Crystalline Core
pickup.effect: Stabilizes energy levels for the boss fight

encounters.trigger: The Golem shatters upon defeat, awakening the guardian of the grove

boss.name: Great Canopy Spirit
boss.victory_condition: Channel the core energy to neutralize the spirit's protective barrier

level.objective: Purify the Sacred Grove by calming the restless Canopy Spirit

pickup.name: Soul Essence Vial
pickup.effect: Restores health and imbues weapon with soul energy

encounters.trigger: Defeating the beast causes the ancient stone gate to grind open, revealing the path to the inner ruins.

pickup.name: Cursed Idol
pickup.effect: Grants shadow-binding properties to physical attacks

encounters.trigger: The spirit dissolves into mist, triggering a mechanism that lifts the barrier to the Heart of the Forest.

pickup.name: Ancient Serpent Scale
pickup.effect: Provides immunity to lethal poisons

encounters.trigger: The stalker's death snaps the final binding vines, clearing the approach to the boss arena.

boss.name: The Blighted Tree-Mother
boss.victory_condition: Use the scale to harden your weapon against her caustic sap before landing the final blow.

level.objective: Cleanse the corruption from the heart of the jungle.

pickup.name: Jar of Singing Pollen
pickup.effect: Temporarily stuns enemies with harmonious vibrations

encounters.trigger: Defeating the frog triggers the appearance of a luminous path leading to the Singing Stream

encounters.hazard: Floating logs that roll when stepped on

pickup.name: Concentrated Nectar Drop
pickup.effect: Increases acid damage for the final confrontation

encounters.trigger: Clearing the vines reveals the hidden entrance to the Elder Tree hollow

pickup.name: Golden Honeycomb Fragment
pickup.effect: Stabilizes the boss's chaotic energy aura

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Imp causes the hollow to open into the Boss Arena

boss.name: Royal Nectar-Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Feed the honeycomb to the Guardian to restore its peaceful demeanor

level.objective: Restore harmony to the Giggling Canopy by calming the corrupted Royal Guardian.

pickup.name: Stasis Vial
pickup.effect: Freezes enemies for 3 seconds

encounters.trigger: Opening the first ancient gate reveals the path to the swamp

pickup.name: Temporal Sand
pickup.effect: Doubles attack speed for 5 seconds

encounters.trigger: Slaying the beast activates the bridge to the monolith

pickup.name: Chronos Core
pickup.effect: Essential component to weaken the Boss

encounters.trigger: Defeating the serpent collapses the ceiling into the Boss chamber

boss.name: Ancient Time-Devourer
boss.victory_condition: Stabilize the jungle timeline using the Chronos Core

level.objective: Restore the temporal flow of the Whispering Canopies

level.setting: An overgrown, silent ruin reclaimed by strangler vines and toxic fog.

pickup.name: Alchemical Fire Vial
pickup.effect: Increases fire damage against organic tissue.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Stalker triggers the collapse of the stone archway into the Inner Grove.

pickup.name: Jagged Bone Hook
pickup.effect: Exposes armor gaps on heavy targets.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Goliath causes the earth to shift, revealing the hidden entrance to the Boss Altar.

pickup.name: Sacred Sunstone
pickup.effect: Stuns shadow-based entities.

encounters.trigger: The death of the Chimera screams awaken the Guardian of the Ruin.

boss.name: The Ancient Forest Sentinel
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Sunstone to shatter the Sentinel's stony exterior then decapitate it.

level.objective: Purify the defiled heart of the jungle by slaying the Ancient Forest Sentinel.
